title: Suspicious Local Account Creation
author: Detection Engineering Team
description: Detects creation of new local user accounts which may indicate an adversary establishing persistence by creating backdoor accounts for future access.
false_positive_notes: Legitimate IT provisioning of new employee accounts. Automated account creation by deployment scripts. Correlate with change management tickets to reduce noise.
severity_rationale: HIGH because account creation establishes persistent access. Backdoor accounts survive reboots, patch cycles, and password resets on other accounts.
